hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: They said "pay in US dollars, it's safer." That's a lie. It costs 2% more.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone pays suppliers in US dollars. Nobody tells you it gets converted twice. Save this.

hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why paying your China supplier in US dollars quietly costs you 2% extra.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: One business owner cut supplier costs by 2% just by paying in yuan, not dollars.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: Your bank won't tell business owners this: US dollar payments to China cost 2% more.
